description: Fix four compounding bugs in the hex dev pipeline that prevent any generated project from compiling

specs.description: resolve_model_id maps YAML tier names to correct Anthropic model IDs
specs.given: An agent YAML declares model tier 'sonnet', 'haiku', or 'opus'
specs.when: resolve_model_id() is called with that tier name

domain_conventions.note: OpenRouter-compatible IDs needed for inference gateway

specs.description: Unknown model tier name falls back to a sensible default, not gpt-4o-mini
specs.given: An agent YAML declares an unrecognized model tier name

specs.description: RL Q-learning receives training signal from code generation outcomes
specs.given: A code generation run completes (success or failure)
specs.then: report_outcome() is called on ModelSelector with the result, updating the Q-table

specs.description: Structured workplan tasks (P0.1-P4.1) execute in order during pipeline
specs.given: A swarm has been initialized with structured P* tasks in HexFlo
specs.then: Supervisor uses the existing P* task IDs from task_id_map — no new shadow tasks are created

specs.description: Pipeline does not create duplicate shadow tasks alongside existing P* tasks
specs.given: SwarmPhase has created P0.1-P4.1 HexFlo tasks and returned task_id_map
specs.then: task_id_map is available to Supervisor so execute_agent_tracked() reuses existing task IDs

specs.description: Fix agent receives all relevant source files as context, not just the test file path
specs.given: A compile error spans main.rs and lib.rs in an output project
specs.when: FixAgent::execute() is called for a fix iteration
specs.then: The inference prompt includes the content of src/main.rs and the error context together

specs.description: Fix iterations carry accumulated error context from previous attempts
specs.given: Fix iteration 1 fails to resolve a compile error
specs.when: Fix iteration 2 is dispatched for the same objective
specs.then: The prompt includes the error output from iteration 1 so the model can reason about what didn't work

specs.description: Fix agent targets all files with errors, not just the first
specs.given: A cargo build error mentions 3 files with errors
specs.then: All 3 files are identified as fix targets for the current iteration

specs.description: Generated Rust test binary name matches the crate name from Cargo.toml
specs.when: The tester agent generates integration tests
specs.then: Tests reference CARGO_BIN_EXE_rust-cli-temperature-converter (exact match to Cargo.toml name)

specs.description: No contradiction between test-generate.md and agent-tester.md on CARGO_BIN_EXE_ usage
specs.given: A tester agent reads both prompt files for guidance
specs.when: The agent decides how to reference the binary in integration tests
specs.then: Both files give consistent guidance (one authoritative rule about binary name injection)

specs.description: Max iterations triggers escalation rather than silent continuation
specs.given: A pipeline tier has exhausted all fix iterations without passing CodeCompiles
specs.then: An inbox notification is sent (priority 2) and the pipeline halts with a clear error — it does not silently continue to the next tier

specs.description: Pipeline start cleans up stale failed-run example directories
specs.given: Previous failed runs have left N partial example directories
specs.when: A new hex dev run begins for the same objective
specs.then: The previous partial directory is removed before code generation starts
